name: Speedy Cream of Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 cups Betty Crocker Potato Buds Mashed potato mix (dry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat.
2. Cook onion in margarine for about 3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until tender.
3. Stir in water, salt, and pepper. Bring to boiling point.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the potato mix until fully dissolved.
5. Serve with shredded cheddar cheese and chopped green onions on top, if desired.
